hypothesis_en: Mr President, ladies and gentlemen, the debate is closed, and in accordance with the agenda, the four political groups are proceeding to debate the oral questions to the Council and the Commission on nuclear disarmament, on the 2005 Conference on the Review of the Treaty on Non-Proliferation, on the work of the European Union for the Third Preparatory Committee for the NPT.
reference_en: thank you Mr Vitorino the debate is now closed (4.29) members moving on with the agenda (1.03) we now have the debate on the oral questions from four political groups to the Council and Commission concerning nuclear disarmament (1.51) concerning the review conference of the NPT (2.7) the work of the European Union for the third preporo= preparatory committee of the NPT (4.42) we do have to carry on ladies and gentlemen (1.13) and I give the floor now to start the debate (1.08) to Mr Wiersma three minutes (1.1) as the author of the oral question
source_es: muchas gracias Señor Vitorino queda cerrado el debate (1.07) (1.61) y Señorías (1.81) de conformidad con el orden del día se procede al debate de las preguntas orales de cuatro grupos políticos al Consejo y a la Comisión sobre el desarme nuclear relativas a la conferencia de examen del Tratado de No ~Progezsión en dos mil cinco los trabajos de la Unión Europea para el tercer comité preparatorio del (1.3) TNP por favor Señorías (1.63) que el orden del día pues continúa (1.06) (1.7) y doy la palabra para iniciar el debate (1.07) al Señor Wiersma tres minutos en calidad de autor
